title: Singular solutions of some nonlinear parabolic equations with spatially   inhomogeneous absorption
summary:
We study the limit behaviour of solutions of a class of solutions of
nonlinear parabolic equations with a degenerate strong absorption. We prove
that two types of phenomena can occur: the pointwise singularity or the
formation of razor blades (or persistent singularities).

title: Neck Pinching Dynamics Under Mean Curvature Flow
summary:
In this paper we study motion of surfaces of revolution under the mean
curvature flow. For an open set of initial conditions close to cylindrical
surfaces we show that the solution forms a "neck" which pinches in a finite
time at a single point. We also obtain a detailed description of the neck
pinching process.
